Question: What is the mean SoilPyrogenicCarbonStock (fire-derived carbon stored in soils) across three measurements: (1) the chronic drought period 2018 anomaly sampling at ECT-NB-001 eddy tower boreal peatland in the anastomosing floodplain abandoned channel with sphagnum-dominated hummock-hollow peat mat vegetation; (2) the pre-disturbance baseline 2008–2010 coeval measurements at ECT-SB-009 subalpine shrubland observatory in a kettle-hole palustrine basin with a xerophilous perennial shrub-steppe assemblage; and (3) the after prescribed burn 2017 seasonal remeasurement at ECT-SB-009 in a kettle-hole palustrine basin with montane needleleaf evergreen with dense litter?
